summary: No architectural drift after packet 21. All 17 API contracts, schema (6 tables), CSS design system (45 properties), and analytics tab wiring match the intended architecture. 402/402 tests pass. Only carryover findings from prior audits plus one new observation: stale full_suite_state.json tracker.
notes: Packets 19 (Time Allocation), 20 (Dep Overlap), and 21 (Analytics Tab Wiring) landed cleanly with no scope creep. AnalyticsTab renders Heatmap, TimeAllocation, and DepOverlap in flex column with 32px gap and 18px section headers per spec §5.6. All three analytics API endpoints return correct response shapes. RuntimeBadge correctly uses --runtime-* CSS vars via template literal. 4 unreferenced CSS design tokens (--status-red-bg, --fresh-border-this-month, --fresh-border-older, --radius-lg) are spec-defined placeholders for future packets. full_suite_state.json records last_full_suite_validated_count=18 but actual is 22 — stale due to full_suite_verification_after_packet_20 failure (caused by pre-written packet 21 test file). Will self-correct at next formal full-suite verification. Dependencies tab placeholder ('coming soon') present since packet 04 with no covering packet in the ladder — pre-existing spec-ladder gap, not drift. Carryover findings unchanged: untracked test files (operator VCS hygiene), is_valid_repo tested but not in production path (available for packet 22), 2x #fff hardcoded values, last_quick_scan_at never written (spec slot).
